message:
fix(security): replace pipe-delimited hash inputs with length-prefixed encoding in 6 files

Pipe-delimited concatenation of variable-length strings before hashing
creates collision risk when fields can contain the delimiter character.
Replace all remaining `format!("{}|{}|...", ...)` patterns feeding into
SHA-256 with length-prefixed encoding `(field.len() as u64).to_le_bytes()`
to ensure unambiguous field boundaries.

Files fixed:
- artifact_contract.rs: compute_contract_signature
- transition_abort.rs: policy_hash
- control_epoch.rs: compute_mac
- vef_policy_constraints.rs: predicate_hash_id (refactored to accept &[&str])
- epoch_transition.rs: manifest_hash_for_transition
- verifier_sdk.rs: compute_binding_hash + state verification binding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
